title: Senior Software Engineer - Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Salesforce India Ventures Solutions - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
